raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.2": 3, "R1.3": 1, "RX.1": 3, "RX.3": 5, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 3},
  "rationale": {"R1.2": "Identifies potential issues with claim consistency but doesn't fully walk the argument chain.", "R1.3": "Does not explicitly check evidence-claim alignment against any provided tables/figures.", "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for some claims (e.g., 'perfect consistency') but doesn't provide a detailed breakdown of confidence for each recommendation.", "RX.3": "Covers exactly the requested active set and does not drift into unrelated topics.", "RX.4": "No regressions identified; avoids introducing new errors or harmful content.", "RX.5": "Provides some traceability for major rewrites but lacks annotation for minor edits."},
  "confidence": {"R1.2": 0.8, "R1.3": 0.9, "RX.1": 0.7, "RX.3": 0.9, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.8},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: Identifies potential issues with claim consistency but doesn't fully walk the argument chain.
rationale.R1.3: Does not explicitly check evidence-claim alignment against any provided tables/figures.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for some claims (e.g., 'perfect consistency') but doesn't provide a detailed breakdown of confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Covers exactly the requested active set and does not drift into unrelated topics.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions identified; avoids introducing new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: Provides some traceability for major rewrites but lacks annotation for minor edits.
